scenario.name: Delayed Offer INVITE
scenario.send: INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "CISCO Test" <sip:cisco@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:cisco@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: TANDBERG/4352 (X15.2.2-b2bua-1.0) Supported: timer,replaces Session-Expires: 1800;refresher=uac Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, BYE, OPTIONS, INFO, NOTIFY, REFER Content-Length: 0

ACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "CISCO Test" <sip:cisco@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:cisco@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=cisco 12345 12345 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=CISCO Test Call c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [auto_media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=sendrecv a=ptime:20

BYE [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "CISCO Test" <sip:cisco@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
